突然就领悟了日语的弹舌发音技巧。同时也明白了日语独特的高低音的产生原因。同时也明白了为什么各种“音便”对于汉语母语者来说一点也不便。因为日语发音完全是另一种方式。简单来说是日语以一口气的连续吹出为核心，通过唇舌变动来变音，尽量不要断气。而汉字更加偏向一字一顿，随时断气。非常有趣。

In order to hide the borders and shadow of the 'checked' button after it transitions from the 'copy' state, I tried the original Claude Code Opus 4.6, Claude Code with Developer Mode via liteLLM (incorporating Grok 4.3 and ChatGPT 5.5), and Google Antigravity Gemini 3.1 Pro High. They all failed. Alongside the subscriptions, xAI and OpenAI cost me $7. Finally, the issue was resolved through a discussion with Gemini 3 Flash, with an one line change. Currently, these models do possess overwhelming knowledge, but they are still not smart enough.

There are many reasons why people should have at least one online AI assistant.
There is one reason for me to have my own one. https://t.co/gKHWE2qWJl

有点低级呀：
claude code includes recent commits in its system prompt and something server side flags HERMES.md and quietly routes you off your max plan onto API rate billing

> AGENTS.md? fine
> README.md? fine
> HERMES without .md? fine
> lowercase hermes.md? fine
> uppercase HERMES.md? you're getting charged API rates

说起来，终结者这电影最大的破绽在于从未来回来的机器人的数量不合理。假设未来的时光机，每发送一个机器人回来之后需要半个小时来充能，恢复。那么一天可以发48个机器人回来。他们可以选择把每个机器人都发回同一个时间点。这样就在目的时间点，可以同时出现48个机器人。并且，他们第二天也可以这样干。他们这样干一年，上面的48就要修正成365x48。可以屠城了。
